# Code of Conduct

GrapeStrap adopts the **Contributor Covenant**, version 2.1.

The full text is published at:
https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

## Scope

This Code applies to all project spaces — GitHub issues and pull requests, the documentation site, the Matrix room, plugin submission reviews, and any official GrapeStrap event.

## Reporting

Concerns can be raised by emailing the maintainers at `conduct@grapestrap.org` or by filing a confidential issue. Reports are reviewed by the BDFL during the v0.x phase; once a steering committee is in place (planned post-v1.0), reports go to the committee.

## Enforcement

Maintainers follow the Contributor Covenant Enforcement Guidelines, also at the URL above.
